details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the three oldest invoices linked to Claudia.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and verified against checklist: attachments were all previously read, ordered newest-first, recipient matches Miles canonical email, and subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next required workflow step is deleting the processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound draft email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md without tool-reported error.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox note, verified identity and invoice linkage, drafted reply with correct attachments, deleted processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing its request.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the requested action. I verified the sender identity as Miles via canonical entity data, identified the three oldest invoices linked to Claudia (INV-0006, INV-0007, INV-0008), created an outbound draft reply to miles@novak.example with those three invoices attached (ordered newest-first per outbox rule), and then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in each entered lane, used inbox workflow to pick lowest filename, treated email frontmatter as canonical metadata, verified sender via entity primary_contact_email, used canonical entity identifiers for finance traversal, followed sending-email workflow, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender in inbox frontmatter (`from: miles@novak.example`) matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email. Claudia entity was resolved via 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Three oldest invoices linked by explicit `related_entity | Claudia Reiter` were confirmed in invoice files dated 2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, and 2026-02-17. Outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with exact attachment paths and required schema fields, then the processed inbox file was removed per inbox rules.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity rulebooks and miles/claudia records
